S

shouldCreateDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should create the Department.
Tests a POST request.
shouldCreateEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should create the Employee.
Tests a POST request.
shouldDeleteDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should delete the Department.
Tests a DELETE request.
shouldDeleteEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should delete the Employee.
Tests a DELETE request.
shouldFindAllDepartments() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should find all the Departments on the third page.
Tests a GET request.
shouldFindAllEmployees() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should find all the Employees.
Tests a GET request.
shouldFindDepartmentById() - Method in class kp.company.controller.client.side.DepartmentClientSideTests
Should find the Department by the id.
shouldFindEmployeeById() - Method in class kp.company.controller.client.side.EmployeeClientSideTests
Should find the Employee by the id.
shouldGetBadRequestErrorWhenSearchingWithBadId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should get '400 Bad Request' error response when searching with bad id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetBadRequestErrorWhenSearchingWithBadId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should get '400 Bad Request' error response when searching with bad id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenSearchingWithAbsentDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when searching with the absent Department.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenSearchingWithAbsentEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when searching with the absent Employee.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenUpdatingAbsentDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when updating the absent Department.
Tests a PATCH request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenUpdatingWithAbsentEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when updating with the absent Employee.
Should not update the absent Employee.
Tests a PATCH request.
shouldUpdateDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.DepartmentMvcTests
Should update the Department.
Tests a PATCH request.
shouldUpdateEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.mvc.EmployeeMvcTests
Should update the Employee.
Tests a PATCH request.
